title: Coppered Equipment
description: A texture upgrade for copper tools and armor to make them a little bit more interesting + oxidizing copper tools
body:
![Coppered Equipment Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e150c2f51b8af949b0287d5eafda09e209aaa9dc_0.webp) **Coppered Equipment** gives a makeover to the copper tools and copper armor textures. ________________________________________________________________________________________________
**Other versions of Coppered Equipment** [![ONLY Tools Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fef0a6f2fc634ae51ea294190e28a9ef653a44d4_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coppered-equipment/version/irQ1JVCX) [![ONLY Armor Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a814a5a071e5546ceb78c3021c673493c9d9cbf_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coppered-equipment/version/RAQ5y5yl) [![Coppered Equipment Classic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eb7bc4d51b4ff7136fbbaf94bd5ed018fe2717d_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coppered-equipment/version/42IDtNNt)
________________________________________________________________________________________________ **Copper Tools**
Copper Pickaxe ![Copper Pickaxe Oxidizing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22eef4e5130daf92104596800ab88f55b2bbc8b6.png)
A brand new look for copper tools. The main part of the tool starts out as shiny orange copper with the blue-green look of oxidized copper on the stick, holding the tools together. The lower the durability on your copper tools, the more oxidized they get! This adds a great visual to how broken your copper tools are.
**Copper Armor**
Copper Armor ![Copper Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/778684da3c9d357b97544534c7637296e6beb939.png) ![Copper Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a43d3db611207eedb658a0ea7927e621f3991cc.png)
Instead of being a retexture of existing metal armor, the copper armor has a texture reminiscent of the design of the copper chest! The armor stays a shiny orange all over as to not interfere with armor trims
